svg.title: ThreatLens system architecture
svg.desc: Three-tier diagram: React frontend at top, FastAPI backend in the middle with IOC normalizer, parallel engine, scorer, and storage layers, then PostgreSQL database and five external threat intel APIs at the bottom.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the ThreatLens React frontend show?')
sendPrompt('How does ThreatLens IOC type auto-detection work?')
sendPrompt('How does the ThreatLens parallel query engine work internally?')
sendPrompt('How does ThreatLens composite scoring and MITRE mapping work?')
sendPrompt('What rows does ThreatLens create per scan?')
sendPrompt('What does ThreatLens background IP enrichment add?')
sendPrompt('What are all the tables in the ThreatLens database?')
sendPrompt('What exact fields does ThreatLens get from VirusTotal?')
sendPrompt('What exact fields does ThreatLens get from AbuseIPDB?')
sendPrompt('What exact fields does ThreatLens get from AlienVault OTX?')
sendPrompt('What exact fields does ThreatLens get from URLhaus?')
sendPrompt('What exact fields does ThreatLens get from GreyNoise?')
